title: sida triquetra
intro: Sida triquetra, also known as the triangular sida, is a plant species in the mallow family native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Sida triquetra include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other female reproductive issues. Sida triquetra can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional African medicine.
